relations.note: Safe pair guidance derives from the WCAG contrast minimums.

quotes: WCAG AA — 4.5:1 body text, 3:1 large text ≥24px or 19px bold
WCAG AA — 4.5:1 body text, 3:1 large text ≥24px or 19px bold

rules.intent: Ensure legibility and WCAG AA accessibility compliance for all text/background pairs.
rules.rule_text: Test contrast levels (webaim.com or equivalent) for every text/background pair. General WCAG AA minimums apply: 4.5:1 for body text (ratio.contrast.body_4_5_1 = 4.5:1) and 3:1 for large text ≥24px or 19px bold (ratio.contrast.large_3_1 = 3:1).

effect.reserved_for: surfaces, rules, and large display emphasis only
effect.subject: gold and sunshine text colors

quotes: golds are for surfaces, rules, and large display emphasis only
Known-safe pairs: Brand Blue, Deep Blue, Dark Navy, Graphite on White/Light Blue/Golden Sand; White on Brand Blue/Deep Blue/Dark Navy.
**Avoid:** Gold or Sunshine text on White (fails contrast) — golds are for surfaces, rules, and large display emphasis only.

rules.intent: Restrict color pairings to contrast-safe combinations and keep golds off body text.
rules.rule_text: Known-safe text/background pairs: Brand Blue (#00529b), Deep Blue (#003D74), Dark Navy (#011E45), Graphite (#212121) on White (#ffffff)/Light Blue (#E6F0F9)/Golden Sand (#FEF1C8); White on Brand Blue/Deep Blue/Dark Navy. Avoid Gold (#ffc60a) or Sunshine (#faa31b) text on White — it fails contrast; golds are reserved for surfaces, rules, and large display emphasis only.

quotes: **Don't rely on color alone** to convey meaning — pair with icons, depth, clear copy, or visual feedback.

rules.intent: Ensure meaning remains accessible to users who cannot perceive color differences.
rules.rule_text: Don't rely on color alone to convey meaning — pair with icons, depth, clear copy, or visual feedback.
